FNV PPLIGHTING PASS DISPATCH TEXTURE-STAGE CONTRACT AUDIT

Questions:
1. Which B7 helpers dispatch current-pass pass entries and call E7EB00/E7DE90?
2. Which pass-entry fields are consumed during apply, especially +0x08/+0x09/+0x0C/+0x64?
3. Does the dispatcher path directly or indirectly reach NiDX9RenderState::SetTexture @ 0x00E88A20?
4. Can a final stage map be proven from pass IDs/varargs, or must Psycho capture E88A20 runtime bindings?
5. Are vtable/data refs 0x010EF6E8 and 0x010F0968 only SetTexture vtable slots, or used by callable dispatch sites?

======================================================================
Pass/pass-entry/render-state offsets under audit
======================================================================
  +0x0008: pass-entry apply flag / written entry value field
  +0x0009: pass-entry vararg used count
  +0x000A: pass-entry vararg capacity
  +0x000B: pass-entry flag byte
  +0x000C: pass-entry vararg pointer / current object list pointer
  +0x0018: NiD3DPass entry count candidate
  +0x0024: NiD3DPass pass-entry pointer array candidate
  +0x0044: NiD3DPass pixel shader pointer
  +0x005C: NiD3DPass vertex shader pointer
  +0x0064: pass-entry resource/object pointer candidate
  +0x10A0: NiDX9RenderState texture cache base
  +0x10F8: NiDX9RenderState D3D device pointer
